metadata.description: Skylence Claude Code marketplace. One plugin: skylence — author, run, lint, and debug .sky workflows for the Skylence harness builder.

plugins.name: skylence
plugins.description: Skylence .sky workflow authoring and operation. 5 slash commands (workflow-new, run, lint, doctor, lsp) and 12 skills: four-delimiter .sky format, sky CLI reference, debugging failed runs, MUST/MUST NOT rules, a meta-workflows catalogue, the judge-design chain (action-surface-audit, judge-criteria, judge-prompt-writer, judge-eval-suite, judge-architecture-review, plus judge-setup which writes a ## Judge section to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md, seeds judge-rules.json from the example, and registers the hook in user settings.json), and skyline-setup (writes a ## Skyline section to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md from skyline's README agent prompt). Bundles 6 MCP servers via .mcp.json (skyway mcp stdio, skyline via npx @skylence-ai/skyline, plus HTTP endpoints for skylence-content, skyline, skyway, and skybox), 13 LSP servers via .lsp.json (skyway lsp stdio for .sky files plus the official Claude Code language servers for C/C++, C#, Go, Java, Kotlin, Lua, PHP, Python, Ruby, Rust, Swift, and TypeScript), a judge hook (PreToolUse deny/allow/escalate rules engine, no-op until ~/.claude/judge-rules.json exists, 20-fixture eval suite included), and a SessionStart steer that prefers skyline MCP tools over built-in file tools. /lsp install <language> installs LSP binaries deterministically per OS. The skyway binary is optional — servers for missing binaries simply don't start.
